title: AWS - Training
html:
AWS - Training

  • bishopfox/CloudFoxable: A Gamified Cloud Hacking Sandbox
  • ine-labs/AWSGoat : A Damn Vulnerable AWS Infrastructure
  • m6a-UdS/dvca - A demonstration project to show how to do privilege escalation on AWS
  • nccgroup/sadcloud - A tool for standing up (and tearing down!) purposefully insecure cloud infrastructure
  • 0xdabbad00/Flaws - Several level of challenges around AWS
  • RhinoSecurityLabs/cloudgoat - "Vulnerable by Design" AWS deployment tool
